subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Creator of Names and Fashioner of earth and heaven! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Holy, Most Resplendent Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا موجد الاسماء و خالق الارض و السماء اسئلک بجمالک الاقدس الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for purity; chastity, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
